meaning: n.买回者,赎身者,救世主,耶稣基督,救世主
examples: One of them is the descending and ascending redeemer figure.
As for our redeemer, the LORD of hosts is his name, the Holy One of Israel.
Either way, he would come as a radical redeemer, a figure appealing equally to religious and political prophets.
It was off the back of this tour that 'The Great Redeemer', Graham Henry, was introduced to Welsh rugby.
